questionHtml: Each measurement was repeated several times. Explain the need for replicates of each treatment.
markschemeHtml:
1. more reliable results;
  2. to identify outliers/anomalous results
    OR
    reduce random errors;
  3. assess the variability of the data
    OR
    allows statistical tests/calculation of mean/standard deviation/correlation;

Mp a: do not accept “accurate”.

meta.title: Each measurement was repeated several times. Explain the need for replicates of each treatment.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
